MeasureFilter.description: Represents a filter condition for measures

expr.description: SQL expression for the filter condition

original_expr.description: Original expression before variable encoding (if variables were used)

MeasureType.description: Represents the type of a measure aggregation

description: Represents a measure in the semantic layer

description.description: Human-readable description of what this measure represents

expr.description: SQL expression for the measure (required for most types, not for count)

filters.description: List of filters to apply to the measure calculation

name.description: Unique identifier for the measure within the view

original_expr.description: Original expression before variable encoding (if variables were used)

samples.description: Sample values or example outputs to help users understand the measure

synonyms.description: Alternative names or terms that refer to this measure

title: Measure
